component.name: LoadChannelsTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "run" end sub
sub run() m.top.responseJson = "" m.top.errorMessage = ""
payload = { setupType: m.top.setupType host: m.top.host username: m.top.username password: m.top.password m3uUrl: m.top.m3uUrl epgUrl: m.top.epgUrl forceRefresh: true }
transfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") transfer.SetUrl(m.top.apiBase + "/api/channels") transfer.AddHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
response = transfer.PostFromString(FormatJson(payload))
if response = invalid or response = "" then m.top.errorMessage = "No channels returned." return end if
m.top.responseJson = response end sub
